name: Appetizer Cheesecake#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crumbs with butter. Set aside 1/4 cup crumbs and press the remainder into the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over orange juice and let stand until softened.
3. Stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Cool mixture.
5. Beat cream cheese until very soft.
6. Beat in 1/2 cup Monterey Jack cheese, sour cream, salt, and curry powder.
7. Fold in orange gelatin.
8. Mix onion, green olives, and celery; reserve 1/2 cup and stir the remainder into the cheese mixture.
9. Pour over crumb crust.
10. Sprinkle reserved crumbs around the edge.
11. Sprinkle reserved onion mixture in the center.
12. Chill at least 2 hours before serving. Cut into narrow wedges to serve. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
